title: How Codex is rewriting the product playbook
speakers: Alexander Embiricos (Head of Enterprise, OpenAI), Kris Rasmussen (Chief Technology Officer, Figma)
key_points: A fireside chat with Alex Embiricos (head of product for Codex at OpenAI) on the vision behind Codex, framed as one of the most influential AI products in the market today.
Covers Codex's evolution from early product decisions through real-world deployment, tracing how the product developed over time.
Explores what Codex reveals about the future of building software and products.
Discusses how AI is transforming team workflows across product, design, and engineering disciplines.
